title: Buffalo Snake Toilet Plunger with Holder | Stongest Flexible Unblocker | More Power than Regular Toilet Plungers for Unblocking | Heavy Duty Plunger | Bellow Design for Low Flow Elongated Loos
features: Better Blockage Buster – Say goodbye to stubborn clogs once and for all! The Buffalo Snake plunger toilet unblocker is built with powerful suction and a force multiplying design, giving you maximum unblocking power with minimum effort. Whether it’s a tough toilet clog or a slow drain, this heavy-duty plunger clears blockages quickly, hygienically, and hassle free.

Toilet Specific Precision – Forget the frustration of using generic plungers that never quite fit. The Buffalo Snake Toilet blockage remover is engineered with a narrow, graduated design that forms a strong, airtight seal inside the toilet bowl for maximum plunging efficiency. Perfectly suited for modern low-flow toilets, elongated styles, and even tricky square-bottom loos, it delivers reliable results every time.

Maximum Force, Minimum Effort – Powered by heavy-duty concertina plastic and a unique bellow design, the Buffalo Snake strongest toilet unblocker delivers an extra surge of pressure with every push. This force multiplying action clears even the toughest blockages in toilets, sinks, basins, and baths fast, effective, and without the need for harsh chemicals.

Hygienic & Easy to Clean – Designed with cleanliness in mind, the toilet auger makes post use care simple. Just add toilet cleaner, plunge with clean water, and the strong suction power flushes away any residue.

Holder Included for Convenience - Comes with a dedicated caddy for tidy storage and quick access beside your toilet. No more hiding plungers away, keep your drain plunger clean, discreet and always within reach.

Versatile Fit – No need to worry about whether it will work with your toilet. The Buffalo Snake Plunger’s graduated, narrow-to-wide design adapts to a variety of toilet types, including low-flow, elongated, and square-bottom bowls. Ready for any blockage, it provides a reliable seal and powerful performance every time, making it the only bathroom plunger you’ll ever need.
